commands.freeform_prompt: re-review please. Updated current-head real behavior proof for the latest PR head under review, `a1326e58c6fdfd3a3d4875c91f543791c04a2f44`. The PR body now uses the exact structured field names required by `scripts/github/real-behavior-proof-check.mjs`, including: - `Behavior or issue addressed` - `Real environment tested` - `Exact steps or command run after this patch` - `Evidence after fix` - `Observed result after fix` - `What was not tested` The refreshed live proof uses the current implementation path without the event-type segment: ```text /_matrix/client/v1/rooms/{roomId}/relations/{threadRootId}/m.thread ``` No Docker build or restart was performed for this proof. ## Real behavior proof - **Behavior or issue addressed:** Matrix native thread reads use the all-relation thread endpoint `/m.thread`, thread reads remain isolated by thread root, and thread reply relation payloads do not include fallback reply metadata by default. - **Real environment tested:** Live Matrix/Synapse-compatible homeserver using Karabo OpenClaw runtime Matrix credentials from a running Docker container. Tokens, room IDs, user IDs, and raw event IDs are intentionally omitted. - **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Created a temporary private Matrix room, sent one main-room message, sent two native Matrix thread roots, sent one reply under each thread root using only `m.thread` relation metadata, queried the v1 `/relations/{threadRootId}/m.thread` endpoint for each root, inspected live relation payloads, then left the temporary room. Current PR head under review: `a1326e58c6fdfd3a3d4875c91f543791c04a2f44`. Captured at UTC: `2026-05-13T17:52:29Z`. - **Evidence after fix:** Redacted copied live output from the real Matrix setup: ```json { "captured_at_utc": "2026-05-13T17:52:29Z", "homeserver_hash": "74c7bd2b1a2b", "live_matrix_actions": { "main_event_hash": "8f40308b0443", "thread_a_reply_hash": "21127706e8a9", "thread_a_root_hash": "2955d8c10015", "thread_b_reply_hash": "7eec64dfe2b5", "thread_b_root_hash": "19e603a4ea56" }, "overall_real_behavior_proof_passed": true, "pr_head": "a1326e58c6fdfd3a3d4875c91f543791c04a2f44", "reply_placement_shape": { "thread_a_has_is_falling_back": false, "thread_a_has_m_in_reply_to": false, "thread_a_rel_type": "m.thread", "thread_a_relation_keys": ["event_id", "rel_type"], "thread_b_has_is_falling_back": false, "thread_b_has_m_in_reply_to": false, "thread_b_rel_type": "m.thread", "thread_b_relation_keys": ["event_id", "rel_type"] }, "room_hash": "f5fe5b7db68b", "runtime_account_hash": "e51963bdfce8", "source": "Karabo OpenClaw runtime Matrix credentials from running Docker container; tokens and raw room/event IDs intentionally omitted", "v1_relations_endpoint": { "event_type_segment_present": false, "path_template": "GET /_matrix/client/v1/rooms/{roomId}/relations/{threadRootId}/m.thread?dir=f&limit=20", "thread_a_contains_a_reply": true, "thread_a_contains_b_reply": false, "thread_a_isolated_from_thread_b": true, "thread_a_relation_event_hashes": ["21127706e8a9"], "thread_b_contains_a_reply": false, "thread_b_contains_b_reply": true, "thread_b_isolated_from_thread_a": true, "thread_b_relation_event_hashes": ["7eec64dfe2b5"] } } cleanup: left temporary proof room ``` - **Observed result after fix:** `/relations/{threadRootId}/m.thread` returned the correct reply for each thread root; Thread A did not include Thread B's reply; Thread B did not include Thread A's reply; reply relation payloads contained only `event_id` and `rel_type`; `is_falling_back` was absent; `m.in_reply_to` was absent; the temporary proof room was left after capture. - **What was not tested:** Live encrypted Matrix rooms and live non-DM group rooms were not tested in this proof; those paths are covered by source inspection and focused Matrix tests. This replaces the stale earlier proof that used `/m.thread/m.room.message`. <!-- clawsweeper-command-progress:start --> Re-review progress: - State: Complete - Detail: The targeted re-review finished, the durable review comment was updated, and the synced verdict was routed. - Run: https://github.com/openclaw/clawsweeper/actions/runs/25817280282 - Updated: 2026-05-13T18:12:36.635Z <!-- clawsweeper-command-progress:end -->
